Sharmila
Music: Vijay Antony

Mascara Pottu mayakkuriye
mastha nee pesi kavukkuriye

Ye madhana moga rupa sundhari

Mascara Pottu mayakkuriye
mastha nee pesi kavukkuriye
mascara pottu mayakkuranaa
mastha pesi kavukkuranaa

moochu muttudhu moochu muttudhu
nee idichadhil neththu

Ye kaththadikku kaththadikku
kaththadi kaththu
ye verthu kottudhu verthu kottudhu
nee moraippadha paarthu.

Ye kadalu kadalu kadalu
alai thazhumbura kadalu
naan padagu padagu padagu
adhil medhakkura padagu.

Udhadu sugaru
odambu fire-u
total glamour-u
enna paarththaa
aerum fever-u

mascara mascara ...
mascara mascara ...

Mascara Pottu mayakkuriye
mastha nee pesi kavukkuriye
mascara pottu mayakkuranaa
masthanaa pesi kavukkuranaa

Hey sexy hippula sexy hippula

dolladikku moon-u.
Hey heat-u koraikka

Thimiru thimiru
un azhagula thimiru.
nee thaviru thaviru
konjam thayakkatha thaviru.

Gold silver dimond

unga munnaal ponnaa alaiyidhu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mascara Pottu?

The song captures a playful and flirtatious vibe, celebrating beauty and charm.

What is the context of Mascara Pottu in the movie Salim?

This song is featured in a lively sequence that emphasizes romance and fun between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Mascara Pottu?

The song is sung by Sharmila and Supriya Joshi.

Who composed the music for Mascara Pottu?

The music is composed by Vijay Antony, known for his catchy and engaging tunes.

When was Mascara Pottu released?

The song was released on November 18, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mascara Pottu, the playful lyrics and upbeat melody create a lively atmosphere that reflects the joy of young love. The song is a celebration of beauty and flirtation, perfectly encapsulating the fun moments shared between the characters in Salim. With its catchy rhythm and engaging vocals, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect addition to any festive occasion. The collaboration between Sharmila and Supriya Joshi adds a unique charm to the track, ensuring it resonates with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mascara Pottu from the movie Salim is a vibrant and energetic duet that showcases the delightful collaboration between Sharmila and Supriya Joshi. With Vijay Antony's catchy music, this song is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the infectious joy and rhythm that makes this track a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: You put on mascara and enchant me, are you talking sweetly? Are you under the spell of mascara, or are you just talking sweetly?
Oh beautiful one, you are the goddess for my friends.
Oh beautiful one, in my night, you are the shining light.
You put on mascara and enchant me, are you talking sweetly? Are you under the spell of mascara, or are you just talking sweetly?
This is shocking, shocking, shocking. The shock is like a kiss, a kiss that you gave yesterday.
For this, you are tied up, tied up, tied up. You are tied up, look at what you have done.
Oh waves, waves, waves, the waves are crashing. I am struggling in them, struggling in them, struggling in them, trying to stay afloat.
Your body is sweet like sugar, total glamour. When I see you, I get a fever.
You put on mascara and enchant me, are you talking sweetly? Are you under the spell of mascara, or are you just talking sweetly?
Hey sexy girl, I am standing here a bit up, I have set a hundred things in my slip.
Hey hot night, in the hot night, the moon is for the doll. Hey heat, to cool it down, I am the cool AC.
Your beauty is dazzling, dazzling. Don't be too much, just a little bit less.
Gold, silver, diamond, mixed together, it looks beautiful. In front of you, it shines.
You put on mascara and enchant me, are you talking sweetly? Are you under the spell of mascara, or are you just talking sweetly?
Oh beautiful one, you are the goddess for my friends.
Oh beautiful one, in my night, you are the shining light.
You put on mascara and enchant me.
